---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[REQUEST] "
labels: enhancement

---

## 📝 Description
A clear and concise description of what you would like to see added or improved.

## 🎯 Use Case
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## 🔄 Alternatives
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context or mockups here.

---
**Note:** This is a portfolio project. Feature requests are welcome as feedback and learning opportunities. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for more information.
